Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

commit.message:
Fix #5: atomic offchain writes prevent crash reconciliation issues

Wrap all pending writes in ABCI Commit within a single database
transaction via new RunInTx method on OffchainStore. If the process
crashes mid-flush, the transaction rolls back and the offchain store
stays consistent — no partial writes that diverge from on-chain state.

Refactored PostgresStore and SQLiteStore to use abstract DB interfaces
(pgxDB / sqlQuerier) so the same store methods work transparently
inside or outside a transaction.

Closes #5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: boson absorption min-age guard, constant tuning, doc updates

- Add BOSON_MIN_AGE (4 substeps) for all boson absorption, not just
  self-absorption. Self-absorption uses 2× min age.
- Add BOSON_ABSORB_FRACTION constant (kept at 1.0 — real issue is
  gravitational lensing pulling pions back to emitter).
- Pion rendering matches photon size formula.
- Config tuning: YUKAWA_G2=32, HIGGS_COUPLING=1, PION_LIFETIME=32,
  SPAWN_OFFSET_MULTIPLIER=1.5, pair production constants reorganized.
- Fix stale docs: CLAUDE.md values, reference.js axion coupling.

Fix #6: bind Ed25519 signatures to HTTP method+path

SignRequest/VerifyRequest now include method and path in the canonical
message (SHA-256(method + " " + path + "\n" + body) || timestamp),
preventing cross-endpoint replay attacks where a valid signature for
one endpoint could be reused against another.

Updated all 5 signing call sites (auth, middleware, MCP, vault, seed)
and all 4 test files. Added TestVerifyRequestCrossEndpointReplay test.

Closes #6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add --ego-xlim option to control Ego Size plot x-axis range

- Add --ego-xlim=min,max option to 05_plot.R and 06_combine_plot.R
  - Allows customization of x-axis range for Ego Size density plots
  - Default: 4,2000 (maintains current behavior)
  - Example: --ego-xlim=4,1000 for narrower focus

- Propagate --ego-xlim option through main pipeline scripts
  - Updated 00_main.R and sm_00_main.R to accept and forward the option
  - Option is passed through to run_plots() function

- Update 06_combine_plot.R to support optional xlim
  - When --ego-xlim is specified, uses fixed range for all samples
  - When not specified, auto-calculates range from data (existing behavior)
  - Applies to both facet plot and multipage PDF

- Update README.md
  - Document --ego-xlim option in main pipeline usage examples
  - Add option table for Step 5 (plotting)
  - Include example usage: --ego-xlim=4,1000

refactor: 6 스킬셋 카테고리 → editorial 흡수, 하이어라키 수정

문제: eae-univ(대학교)와 eae.kr(방송국)에 같은 6 스킬셋 카테고리가 중복.
eae.kr은 방송국이지 대학교 복사본이 아니다.

변경:
- eml, qsketch, mal, penon, phl, patchtech 카테고리 삭제
- 해당 MDX 7개를 editorial 카테고리로 이동 + category 변경
- categories.js에서 6 스킬셋 항목 제거 (11개 → 5개)
- publish-eae-kr.sh 리팩토링: 로컬 렛저(eae-univ) → 액추얼 렛저(eae.kr) 전기 구조

최종 카테고리:
  eae-blueprint (메타/설계)
  editorial (편집술 — 6 스킬셋 포함)
  operational (운영술)

otel-collector waits for signoz server to be healthy before connecting
via OpAMP.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add research branching system (Discovery Agent + Research Tree)

FARS-inspired research tree with study IDs and follow-up proposals:

- New Discovery Agent (Stage 5): Analyzes completed research, identifies
  gaps/limitations/unexpected results, proposes 3-5 follow-up directions
- Research Tree (research_tree.json): Tracks all studies and their
  parent-child relationships in a persistent graph
- Study IDs: Each study gets a unique ID (R001, R002, ...)
- Branch IDs: Follow-ups get IDs like R001-A, R001-B, etc.
- Continue command: `python3 run.py --continue R001-A` to pursue a branch
- Tree view: `python3 run.py --tree` to visualize the research graph

Tested: R001 (statistical power) → R001-A → R002 (unbalanced designs)
Both studies completed successfully with PDF papers and 5 new branches each.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Require explicit MONGO* env vars; remove MONGODB_URI user-facing config

resolveMongoUri() always builds the URI from MONGOHOST, MONGOPORT,
MONGODATABASE (required) plus optional MONGOUSER+MONGOPASSWORD pair.
Fails fast with a clear error if any required var is missing or if
only one of user/password is provided. connectDb() accepts a URI
override for tests (MongoMemoryServer) without polluting env vars.
Updated .env to use individual vars; tests pass URI directly.

commit.message:
fix(ui): stabilize WebSocket, reduce tab switch lag, increase deploy timeout

- useWebSocket: store callbacks in refs so the socket connection is never
  recreated when callback references change. This prevents missed
  task_updated events that caused status to stick on "Pending".
- Tasks page: only show full loading spinner on initial mount, not on
  subsequent tab/page/search changes (stale data shown while refreshing).
- deploy.yaml: increase SSH command_timeout from default 10m to 30m to
  prevent timeout during Docker builds on the 4GB VPS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix block comment cache performance: string-based O(1) lookup

The previous inline computation (7df9d77) was O(N) per line per render
cycle, making the IDE unresponsive on larger files. Replace with a
string-based cache built in parse(): each char's charCodeAt = depth at
that line. O(N) build once, O(1) lookup per line. Perry-safe (uses
string += instead of array indexed assignment).
